| **All time** | — | 2,179 | — | — | — |

*PR counts for 180d and since June: run `gh pr list --state merged --json mergedAt` when not rate-limited.*

## How to Regenerate

```bash
# Full stats (includes LOC) — last 30 days default
./loc.sh

# Stats for specific period (no LOC, faster)
python3 scripts/analyze_git_stats.py --single-repo --no-loc 2026-02-08   # 30d
python3 scripts/analyze_git_stats.py --single-repo --no-loc 2025-12-10   # 90d
python3 scripts/analyze_git_stats.py --single-repo --no-loc 2025-09-11   # 180d
python3 scripts/analyze_git_stats.py --single-repo --no-loc 2025-06-15   # since June

# PR count (requires gh auth)
gh pr list --state merged --limit 6000 --json number,mergedAt | jq length
```

*Note: The `gh pr list` call in the Python script may timeout on long date ranges (30s default). PR counts above were obtained via direct `gh` calls.*
